current_hypothesis: The AI content stack has matured to the point where a solo creator or small team can produce broadcast-quality multimedia at 95%+ cost savings. Key March 2026 shifts: LTX 2.3 is the new OSS video leader (5.7x faster, 4K+audio, Apache 2.0); character consistency is now achievable via Identity-Lock + LoRA; ComfyUI App Mode democratizes local workflows for non-technical users. Legal: EU AI Act deadline Aug 2 2026; California transparency laws in effect.
